samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Implement a 16-bit divider module with 16-bit dividend and 8-bit divisor in combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend input.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor input.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient output.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder output.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        Always block 1: Update a_reg and b_reg with inputs A and B.
        Always block 2: Perform division operation based on extracted bits and comparison with divisor.
    </implementation>
</module>
